name: Morning Reflections with Rebecca - Radio Show
notes: Weekly Saturday 7-9 AM broadcast on WGSP 1490 AM. Covers guest booking, segment planning, script writing, and sponsor coordination.

name: Community Church Health Fair 2026
notes: Annual Grace Community Church health fair coordinated with Deacon Charles Mosley. Free screenings, wellness tables, and community outreach. Targeting Saturday October 3, 2026.

name: CPE Continuing Education - 2026
notes: Board Certified Chaplain continuing education tracking. Deadline 2026-12-31. 50 hrs required; 28 completed as of March 2026.
